description: Non-estimable median — PFS survival curve never drops below 0.5 in either arm. Agent should return 'NE' or 'NA' for median PFS rather than crashing or imputing a value.

adsl.note: Both arms have very long PFS — median not estimable within study follow-up

adtte.note: 18/20 Experimental subjects censored, 19/20 Control subjects censored. Survival curve stays above 0.5.

expected_output.explanation: Median PFS not estimable — survival probability never reaches 0.5 in either arm
